description: A handoff summary is the output of the `handoff` command. It is a self-contained context document for starting a new conversation with no prior session history.

fields.project_state: 3-5 sentence description: what Lumen is, current phase, current focus
fields.session_accomplishments: Bulleted list of concrete artifacts, decisions, and confirmed constraints from this session
fields.active_constraints: Complete numbered list of constraints that must carry forward — exhaustive, not summarized
fields.decisions_made: Table of architectural or protocol decisions made this session: decision | rationale | impact
fields.open_items: Bulleted list of unresolved questions and blockers, flagged as BLOCKING or BACKGROUND
fields.critical_files: Bulleted list of files a fresh context must read before proceeding, with one-line descriptions
fields.next_action: Exactly one next action, structured as a mini task brief: title + goal + model preference + first step

quality_requirements: Must be complete enough to resume work without any clarifying questions
Must list every active constraint — omitting any is a correctness defect
Must be compact — no prose where a list suffices
Must not introduce new interpretations — records what was done, not what could have been done
Must be usable as the first message in a new conversation
